⚙️ Settings
🔑 API Key & Model
✅ Serper key se AI Notes Generator real books, PYQ sites, NCERT, YouTube se asli data laayega!
🏆 Best Free Model: "Llama 4 Scout" — 30,000 TPM (sabse zyada free limit!)
💡 Rate limit aane par: Llama 4 Scout select karo — 5x zyada tokens!
⏱️ Daily limit reset hoti hai midnight ke baad (UTC)
☁️ Cloud Sync (Firebase)
🔄 Checking...
📦 Backup & Restore

JSON backup mein saara data (subjects, exams, history, highlights, saved facts) safe rahega.

⚠️ Data Management
🔄 App Refresh

Accidental swipe se page reload block hai. Agar manually app refresh karna ho to neeche button use karo.

📱 App Install Karo (Free)
📌 GitHub Pages pe free deploy karo:
1. github.com pe account banao
2. New repository banao (e.g. examprep)
3. Is HTML file ko index.html naam se upload karo
4. Settings → Pages → Source: main → Save
5. URL milega: username.github.io/examprep 🎉
Hamesha free, koi expiry nahi!

▲ HIDE
🖊
⊞ Saari Slides
📖 Study Canvas — Kaise Use Karein?
✍️
TEXT MODE — Text likhna
Upar ✍️ Text tab select karo.
Canvas par kahi bhi tap karo → text box khulega → keyboard se likho.
Likhne ke baad keyboard band karo ya bahar tap karo → box set ho jayega.
Double tap kisi bhi box par → dobara edit mode.
💡 Box ke andar tap karo to wo select hoga — B I U A- A+ color buttons dikhenge upar.
☝️
SELECT MODE — Box move/resize/rotate karna
☝️ Select tab select karo.
Kisi bhi box par ek baar tap karo → blue dashed border aayega + B I U toolbar.
Drag karo box ko → move hoga.
Blue dot (neeche-right) → drag karo → resize hoga.
Purple dot (upar-right) → drag karo → rotate hoga.
💡 Ek baar tap = sirf move. Dono ungli se pinch = resize. Deselect karne ke liye khali jagah tap karo.
✏️
DRAW MODE — Haath se draw karna
✏️ Draw tab select karo.
Toolbar se ✒️ Pen / 🖊️ Marker / 🧹 Eraser choose karo.
Size S/M/L aur color select karo.
Canvas par finger ghuma do → drawing hogi.
💡 Draw mode mein text boxes move nahi honge — sirf drawing hogi. Move ke liye Select mode mein jao.
🗺
MAP MODE — Mind Map banana
🗺 Map tab select karo.
Canvas par tap karo → node add hoga → naam type karo.
Ek node par double tap karo → connect mode → doosre node par tap karo → line ban jaayegi.
Node ko drag karo → move hoga.
💡 Node delete karne ke liye upar toolbar ka 🗑 use karo.
📋
NOTES SE TEXT DRAG karna
Notes editor mein koi text select karo (press & hold).
Selected text ko Study Canvas ki taraf drag karo → canvas par ek text box ban jaayega.
Ya copy karo → Select mode mein canvas par tap karo → paste.
💡 Koi bhi important point notes se directly canvas par le aao — type karne ki zarurat nahi!
📑
SLIDES — Multiple pages
Neeche ＋ button → nayi slide add hogi.
Dots tap karo → kisi bhi slide par jump karo.
‹ › arrows → prev/next slide.
⊞ button → saari slides ek saath dekho (grid view).
💡 Har notes type ke liye alag slide banao — ek slide mein headings, doosre mein drawing, teesre mein mind map!
💾
SAVE karna
Neeche-right 💾 Save button dabao → saari slides ek saath save ho jaayengi.
Yeh topic ka data hai — chahe koi bhi notes kholo, same canvas milega.
💡 Undo (↩) Redo (↪) buttons hamesha available hain — galti ho to ghabrao mat!
⚡ Quick Reference
Single tap box
Select
Double tap box
Edit text
Drag box
Move (Select mode)
Blue dot drag
Resize
Purple dot drag
Rotate
Canvas tap
Add text (Text mode)
↩ / ↪
Undo / Redo
⛶ button
Full screen
📝 Notes mein Add Karo
🤖 AI Quiz Director
AI ko batao kaisi quiz chahiye -- topic focus, difficulty, question style, ya koi bhi khaas cheez. AI usi hisab se quiz banayega!
Namaste! 🙏 Main tumhari quiz customize karne mein help karunga.

Batao -- kaisi quiz chahiye? Jaise:
• "Sirf dates wale questions chahiye"
• "Bahut hard tricky questions chahiye"
• "Gandhi ji ke baare mein focus karo"
• "PYQ style mein exam jaise questions"
✅ Direction set:
🔧 Firebase Setup
Ek baar setup karna hai:
1. console.firebase.google.com pe jao
2. New project banao → Web app add karo
3. Authentication enable karo (Email + Google)
4. Firestore Database banao (Start in test mode)
5. Project settings → Your apps → Config copy karo
6. Neeche paste karo 👇

✅ Notes Ready!
🎬 YouTube / 🎵 Audio se Notes
YouTube video ka link paste karo -- transcript automatically extract hogi:
💡 Agar auto-fetch kaam na kare:
YouTube app → video → ⋮ → Transcript → Copy → "📝 Paste" tab

✅ Audio tab bhi use kar sakte ho -- video ka audio download karke Whisper AI se exact transcription milegi!
Audio file chunno (MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG) -- browser speech recognition se text extract hoga:
🎵
Audio File Chunno
MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG support
💡 Note: Browser speech recognition use hogi -- Hindi + English dono supported hain. Lamba audio slow ho sakta hai.
YouTube transcript, koi bhi text, notes -- yahan paste karo:
